headline: Is Lamb Weston (LW) Pricing Look Attractive After Recent Share Rebound?
summary: If you are wondering whether Lamb Weston Holdings is attractively priced today, it helps to line up the recent share moves with what the underlying valuation story actually says. The stock last closed at US$46.00, with returns of 8.8% over 7 days and 15.0% over the past month, while the 1 year return sits at an 8.2% decline and the 3 and 5 year returns show larger declines. Recent coverage has focused on Lamb Weston Holdings as investors reassess its share price in light of its position...
